note.en: LHR 11:45 · Elizabeth Line to NW6 · Harrods · Hyde Park
note.pt: LHR 11:45 · Elizabeth Line até NW6 · Harrods · Hyde Park

description.en: Terminal arrival. Immigration + baggage ~45 min.
description.pt: Chegada no terminal. Imigração + bagagem ~45 min.

description.en: Elizabeth Line to Bond Street, Jubilee to South Hampstead. ~1h door to door.
description.pt: Elizabeth Line até Bond Street, Jubilee até South Hampstead. ~1h porta a porta.

description.en: NW6 3RS. Quick meal, shower, get dressed.
description.pt: NW6 3RS. Refeição rápida, banho, trocar de roupa.

description.en: Iconic luxury department store. Egyptian escalator, food halls, window displays.
description.pt: Loja de departamentos icônica. Escada rolante egípcia, food halls, vitrines.

description.en: Serpentine Lake · Italian Gardens · Diana Memorial Fountain. Golden hour light.
description.pt: Lago Serpentine · Jardins Italianos · Fonte Memorial Diana. Luz dourada.

description.en: Reservation 19:30.
description.pt: Reserva às 19:30.

description.en: Tube or taxi back to South Hampstead.
description.pt: Metrô ou táxi de volta para South Hampstead.

note.en: Breakfast 8:45 Sky Garden · Tower of London 11am · Boat to Greenwich
note.pt: Café 8:45 Sky Garden · Torre de Londres 11h · Barco para Greenwich

description.en: Jubilee line to Westminster, change to District/Circle line to Monument. ~40 min.
description.pt: Jubilee line até Westminster, troca para District/Circle line até Monument. ~40 min.

description.en: 20 Fenchurch Street. Free entry, booking required. 360° views of London from the 35th floor.
description.pt: 20 Fenchurch Street. Entrada gratuita, reserva obrigatória. Vista 360° de Londres do 35º andar.

description.en: Stunning Victorian covered market. Used as Diagon Alley in Harry Potter. Beautiful painted ceiling and cobblestone paths. 2 min walk north from Sky Garden.
description.pt: Impressionante mercado coberto vitoriano. Usado como Beco Diagonal no Harry Potter. Teto pintado e caminhos de paralelepípedo. 2 min a pé do Sky Garden.

description.en: Monument to the Great Fire of London. 311 steps to the top. Spectacular City views. 5 min walk south from Leadenhall.
description.pt: Monumento ao Grande Incêndio de Londres. 311 degraus até o topo. Vista espetacular. 5 min a pé de Leadenhall.

description.en: Ruined Gothic church turned public garden. One of London’s most atmospheric spots. Beautiful arches overgrown with plants. 3 min walk east from the Monument.
description.pt: Igreja gótica em ruínas transformada em jardim público. Um dos lugares mais atmosféricos de Londres. Arcos cobertos de plantas. 3 min a leste do Monumento.

description.en: Crown Jewels · White Tower · Beefeater tours · Ravens. Allow 2–3 hours.
description.pt: Jóias da Coroa · Torre Branca · Tours dos Beefeaters · Corvos. Reserve 2–3 horas.

description.en: Quick lunch before the boat. Options at St Katharine Docks or Tower Hill.
description.pt: Almoço rápido antes do barco. Opções em St Katharine Docks ou Tower Hill.

description.en: Uber Boat from Tower Pier to Greenwich Pier. ~30 min. Great views of Canary Wharf and the Thames.
description.pt: Uber Boat de Tower Pier a Greenwich Pier. ~30 min. Vistas de Canary Wharf e do Tâmisa.

description.en: Iconic 19th-century clipper ship. Walk under the glass-lifted hull.
description.pt: Navio clipper icônico do século XIX. Caminhe sob o casco de vidro.

title.en: Painted Hall — Old Royal Naval College
title.pt: Painted Hall — Old Royal Naval College

description.en: The “Sistine Chapel of the UK.” Tickets already booked. Stunning Baroque ceiling by Thornhill.
description.pt: A “Capela Sistina do Reino Unido.” Ingressos já comprados. Teto barroco deslumbrante por Thornhill.

description.en: Walk uphill to the Prime Meridian line. Panoramic view of Canary Wharf and the Thames.
description.pt: Subida até a linha do Meridiano de Greenwich. Vista panorâmica de Canary Wharf e do Tâmisa.

description.en: Covered market with street food, crafts, antiques. Good spot for a coffee break.
description.pt: Mercado coberto com comida de rua, artesanato, antiguidades. Bom para um café.

title.pt: Drinks e jantar — The Trafalgar Tavern

description.en: Historic riverside pub in Greenwich. Thames views, traditional British food, great ales. Take your time and enjoy the evening.
description.pt: Pub histórico à beira do Tâmisa em Greenwich. Vista do rio, comida britânica tradicional, ótimas cervejas. Aproveitem a noite com calma.

description.en: DLR from Cutty Sark to Bank, Jubilee line to South Hampstead. ~50 min.
description.pt: DLR de Cutty Sark até Bank, Jubilee line até South Hampstead. ~50 min.

note.pt: Tour guiado de dia inteiro · Saída ~08:00

description.en: Jubilee to Green Park, Victoria line to Victoria. ~35 min.
description.pt: Jubilee até Green Park, Victoria line até Victoria. ~35 min.

title.en: Tour departs — Lite Bite Cafe Bar
title.pt: Saída do tour — Lite Bite Cafe Bar

description.en: Meeting point near Victoria Coach Station. 2h coach ride to the Cotswolds.
description.pt: Ponto de encontro perto de Victoria Coach Station. 2h de ônibus até os Cotswolds.

description.en: Honey-stone High Street, medieval market hall, thatched cottages. Self-guided, 50 min.
description.pt: High Street em pedra cor de mel, mercado medieval, casas de colmo. Autoguiado, 50 min.

description.en: Iconic folly tower on a hilltop. Views across 16 counties on a clear day. Guided tour, 10 min.
description.pt: Torre folérica icônica no topo de uma colina. Vista de 16 condados em dia claro. Tour guiado, 10 min.

description.en: Lavender fields and farm shop. Self-guided, 10 min. Best in June–August but the shop is open year-round.
description.pt: Campos de lavanda e loja da fazenda. Autoguiado, 10 min. Melhor de junho a agosto, mas a loja abre o ano todo.

description.en: Tiny Cotswold hamlet. Snowshill Manor (National Trust) if time allows. Scenic drive, 20 min.
description.pt: Pequeno vilarejo dos Cotswolds. Snowshill Manor (National Trust) se houver tempo. Passeio cênico, 20 min.

description.en: Charming market town. Famous wooden door at St Edward’s Church. Antique shops. 30 min.
description.pt: Cidade de mercado charmosa. Porta de madeira famosa na Igreja St Edward. Lojas de antiguidades. 30 min.

description.en: “Venice of the Cotswolds.” Low stone bridges over River Windrush. Lunch stop — 1 hour.
description.pt: “Veneza dos Cotswolds.” Pontes de pedra sobre o Rio Windrush. Parada para almoço — 1 hora.

description.en: Arlington Row — the most photographed cottages in England. Bibury trout farm. 25 min.
description.pt: Arlington Row — as casas mais fotografadas da Inglaterra. Truiticultura de Bibury. 25 min.

description.en: Final Cotswolds scenic drive, then 2h coach back to London.
description.pt: Último passeio cênico pelos Cotswolds, depois 2h de ônibus de volta a Londres.

description.en: Back at Lite Bite Cafe Bar, Victoria area.
description.pt: De volta no Lite Bite Cafe Bar, região de Victoria.

description.en: Rest day after the tour. Casual dinner near home or Soho.
description.pt: Dia de descanso após o tour. Jantar casual perto de casa ou em Soho.

description.en: Tube back to South Hampstead.
description.pt: Metrô de volta para South Hampstead.

title.pt: Sair de casa — NW6 para King’s Cross

description.en: Jubilee line to King’s Cross. Train to Edinburgh ~4h.
description.pt: Jubilee line até King’s Cross. Trem para Edimburgo ~4h.

description.en: Walk or taxi to 2 Upper Bow.
description.pt: Taxi ou a pé até o 2 Upper Bow.

description.en: Grassmarket. Craft beer, Neapolitan pizza, rooftop with castle views.
description.pt: Grassmarket. Cerveja artesanal, pizza napolitana, terraço com vista do castelo.

description.en: The Harry Potter inspiration cafe. Victoria Street area.
description.pt: O café que inspirou Harry Potter. Região da Victoria Street.

description.en: Victoria Street · Grassmarket · Vennel Viewpoint · Greyfriars Bobby

reason.en: Combined Liana's two walks into one flowing route.

description.en: Harry Potter connection — atmosphere and a photo, not a full sit-down.

reason.en: Kept but shortened. Food unremarkable — go for the experience.
reason.pt: Mantido mas encurtado. Comida sem destaque — vá pela experiência.

description.en: French bistro, Grassmarket. Beef bourguignon, mussels, creme brulee. No spicy food.
description.pt: Bistrô francês, Grassmarket. Boeuf bourguignon, mexilhões, crème brûlée. Sem pimenta.

reason.en: Best first dinner — cosy, no spice, great castle location.
reason.pt: Melhor primeiro jantar — aconchegante, sem pimenta, perto do castelo.

description.en: Early start needed today.
description.pt: Saída cedo hoje.

description.en: Castle is at the top of the Royal Mile — your street.

description.en: Castle views from the window. Great spot to rest after the castle.
description.pt: Vista para o castelo pela janela. Ótimo para descansar após o castelo.

note.en: Alternative nearby: Waterstones Princes Street — top floor has equally stunning castle views and a great atmosphere.
note.pt: Alternativa próxima: livraria Waterstones na Princes Street — o andar de cima tem vista igualmente incrível para o castelo e ótimo ambiente.

reason.en: Starbucks kept — great castle views. Waterstones bookshop nearby is a charming alternative with the same views.

reason.en: Arrive at 17:45 to explore. Café Calton on site from 18:30 for drinks and the sunset — no rush.

description.en: On top of Calton Hill, inside the old City Observatory. Liana's pick — panoramic terrace views. Stay for the sunset.
description.pt: No topo do Calton Hill, dentro do antigo Observatório. Escolha da Liana — terraço com vista panorâmica. Ficar para o pôr do sol.

reason.en: Liana's pick — Café Calton is on top of the hill. Drinks and sunset in one spot.
reason.pt: Escolha da Liana — Café Calton fica no topo do Calton Hill. Drinks e pôr do sol no mesmo lugar.

description.en: Dundas Street. Modern European, seasonal Scottish ingredients. 4.9 stars. No spice. Late dinner after the sunset.
description.pt: Dundas Street. Culinária europeia moderna, ingredientes escoceses sazonais. 4.9 estrelas. Sem pimenta. Jantar tardio após o pôr do sol.

reason.en: Moved from Friday. Dinner at 20:30 after sunset on Calton Hill — Under The Table seats late.
reason.pt: Movido da sexta. Jantar às 20:30 após o pôr do sol no Calton Hill — Under The Table recebe tarde.

note.pt: Sem alterações do plano da Liana — perfeito assim

description.en: NW1 5AR, near Regent's Park. Docs: license, passport, credit card.
description.pt: NW1 5AR, próximo a Regent's Park. Docs: CNH, passaporte, cartão.

description.en: A40/M4 west. ~50 min.
description.pt: A40/M4 rumo ao oeste. ~50 min.

description.en: State Apartments · St George's Chapel (Harry & Meghan's wedding) · Guard change. ~2h30.
description.pt: State Apartments · Capela de São Jorge (casamento de Harry e Meghan) · Troca da guarda. ~2h30.

description.en: The Duchess of Cambridge (pub), Meimo (Japanese), or quick bite.
description.pt: The Duchess of Cambridge (pub), Meimo (japonês) ou lanche rápido.
~1h30 pela A303.

description.en: 5,000-year-old UNESCO monument. Visitor centre + shuttle to stones. ~1h30.
description.pt: Monumento UNESCO de 5.000 anos. Centro de visitantes + transporte até as pedras. ~1h30.

description.en: ~45 min via A36.
description.pt: ~45 min pela A36.

title.pt: Chegada a Bath · Check-in no hotel

description.en: Rest before evening walk.
description.pt: Descanso antes do passeio noturno.

description.en: Royal Crescent · The Circus · Pulteney Bridge. All walkable in the historic centre.
description.pt: Royal Crescent · The Circus · Pulteney Bridge. Tudo a pé no centro histórico.

description.en: Sally Lunn's (historic), The Ivy Bath Brasserie, or Sotto Sotto (Italian).
description.pt: Sally Lunn's (histórico), The Ivy Bath Brasserie, ou Sotto Sotto (italiano).

note.en: Castle Combe → Lacock → Burford → Oxford guided tour 4pm
note.pt: Castle Combe → Lacock → Burford → Tour guiado Oxford 16h

description.en: Hotel breakfast or The Bridge Coffee Shop.
description.pt: Café do hotel ou The Bridge Coffee Shop.

description.en: Opens 9am. Arrive early to avoid queues. ~1h.
description.pt: Abre às 9h. Chegue cedo. ~1h.

description.en: ~20 min north of Bath.
description.pt: ~20 min ao norte de Bath.

description.en: Often voted prettiest village in England. Stone bridge over By Brook, medieval church.
description.pt: Frequentemente eleito o vilarejo mais bonito da Inglaterra. Ponte sobre o By Brook, igreja medieval.

description.en: ~25 min via A420.
description.pt: ~25 min pela A420.

description.en: Medieval village preserved by National Trust. Lacock Abbey = Hogwarts corridors in Harry Potter. Free village entry (Abbey ~£15).
description.pt: Vilarejo medieval preservado pelo National Trust. Lacock Abbey = corredores de Hogwarts em Harry Potter. Vilarejo gratuito (Abbey ~£15).

description.en: ~1h via A40. Beautiful countryside.
description.pt: ~1h pela A40. Estrada bonita.

description.en: 'Gateway to the Cotswolds.' Charming High Street down to river. Lunch: The Bull or The Highway Inn.
description.pt: 'Portal dos Cotswolds.' High Street charmosa até o rio. Almoço: The Bull ou The Highway Inn.

description.en: ~30 min via A40.
description.pt: ~30 min pela A40.

description.en: Park & Ride (Pear Tree or Seacourt). Covered Market, Broad Street.
description.pt: Park & Ride (Pear Tree ou Seacourt). Covered Market, Broad Street.

description.en: 1h30 tour. Historic college + Bodleian Library. £29/person. Meeting: Trinity College gates, Broad Street.
description.pt: Tour de 1h30. College histórico + Biblioteca Bodleiana. £29/pessoa. Ponto: portões do Trinity College, Broad Street.

description.en: Radcliffe Camera (photo) · G&D's (artisan ice cream) or The Grand Café.
description.pt: Radcliffe Camera (foto) · G&D's (sorvete artesanal) ou The Grand Café.

description.en: ~1h30 via M40.
description.pt: ~1h30 pela M40.

description.en: Drop off the car and walk home. Trip complete!
description.pt: Devolver o carro e ir para casa. Viagem completa!
